name: apex-class
description: Generate production-ready Apex classes for Salesforce following enterprise best practices. Covers service classes, selectors, domain classes, batch/queueable/schedulable, DTOs, utilities, interfaces, abstract classes, and custom exceptions. Not for triggers or unit tests. Use this skill whenever the user asks to create, write, build, generate, or scaffold any Apex class — including when they describe functionality that would require an Apex class without explicitly saying "Apex class."
